messages.subject: [R-sig-genetics] Announcement: R-sig-genetics
messages.body_plain:
Welcome on R-sig-genetics.


The *R-sig-genetics* mailing list is devoted to discussions about the
analysis of genetic markers using the R software.

*Covered topics are:*
- population genetics
- linkage disequilibrium
- spatial genetics
- multivariate methods
- Bayesian clustering
- data simulation
- import/export among R packages, or between R packages and other
softwares.
- data manipulation
Announcement of new implementations of methods for genetic data analysis
are also welcome.

Posts about genomics should be sent to appropriate mailing list on
Bioconductor (see http://www.bioconductor.org/docs/mailList.html).
Posts about phylogeny and comparative methods should be sent to
R-sig-phylo (see https://stat.ethz.ch/mailman/listinfo/r-sig-phylo).

Posting to this list is open to non-members, but messages will be held
for moderation (spam prevention).
Please send *plain text* emails instead of html.

To see the collection of prior postings to the list, visit the
R-sig-genetics Archives (https://stat.ethz.ch/pipermail/r-sig-genetics/).

Best regards,

Thibaut Jombart.

-- 
######################################
Thibaut JOMBART
